page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software package and web tool that probabilistically determines whether a lysine residue in a protein is ubiquitinated. It is a random forest-based predictor of potential ubiquitination sites in proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software package and web tool that probabilistically determines whether a lysine residue in a protein is ubiquitinated. It is a random forest-based predictor of potential ubiquitination sites in proteins.
